current_problem: 相关工作段落层次不够清楚。
proposed_change: 重写为更清晰的 related-work 段落。
current_text: Considerable effort has been devoted to quantum preconditioning. Contributions include structural preconditioners tailored to specific problem classes...
proposed_text: A substantial body of work has studied quantum preconditioning. Existing approaches include structural preconditioners tailored to specific problem classes...
reason: 新句式用 A substantial body of work 统摄文献列表，避免 Contributions include 这种略显突兀的开头；同时把 optimization oriented 等名词前复合修饰语改为 optimization-oriented，更符合学术英语规范。
$n$-qubit 在 Pauli words 前作复合修饰语，使用连字符能减少歧义并保持术语格式一致。
